purpose: Prioritized work packets for Aristotle / Lean / Sage / Z3 handoff.

queue.goal: Formalize and test the distinction between intrinsic equality and degenerative/saturation equality for C vs GAssoc.
queue.expected_output: Either a checked classification predicate for R13 or a counterexample/underdetermination report.

queue.goal: Generate finite cosmohedron/Matryoshka cover data and test primitive move-class multiplicity against A and M1 baselines.
queue.expected_output: Finite check result for R2/R3 with explicit n-range, counterexamples, and equivalence relation on move classes.

queue.goal: Verify that noncrossing-chord face-poset covers change rank by one under declared grading.
queue.expected_output: Finite checker and/or Lean theorem for associahedron unit descent baseline.

queue.goal: Encode curve-intersection u-equation and binary boundary behavior for small surface examples.
queue.expected_output: Finite curve/intersection examples with u-equation consistency and failure cases.

queue.goal: Formalize ledger invariant: same boundary/log form cannot imply realization equivalence without a bulk-equivalence proof.
queue.expected_output: A formal or schema-level guard blocking invalid realization-equivalence promotion.
